description_long: This is a luxurious, mid-century modern swivel chair with a matching ottoman, reminiscent of the iconic Eames Lounge Chair. The chair features a deep, tufted black leather upholstery on both the seat and backrest, providing plush comfort and a sophisticated look. The outer shell is crafted from curved, polished wood panels, adding warmth and contrast to the dark leather. The chair is supported by a sturdy, black metal central column that branches into a five-point star base, ensuring stability and smooth swiveling. The armrests are thickly padded and seamlessly integrated into the seat, while the ottoman mirrors the chair's design with matching materials and a four-legged metal base. Visible hardware on the back and base highlights the chair's robust construction and attention to detail.
description: A high-end, black leather and wood swivel chair with a matching ottoman, featuring plush tufted upholstery, curved wood shell, and a sturdy metal star base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted black leather seat and backrest, padded armrests, and the ottoman aligned directly in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's ergonomic recline, thick cushioning, curved wood shell, and the ottoman's matching design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the polished wood back panel, exposed metal hardware, and the central support column branching into a star base.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the chair's contoured profile, armrest integration, and the ottoman's proximity.
attribute_central_support_column: A black metal cylindrical column branching into a five-point star base, fixed and robust, supporting the chair's weight.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, wide, and gently curved with deep button tufting, upholstered in black leather, and encased in a polished wood shell with visible hardware.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, padded, and upholstered in black leather, seamlessly integrated into the seat structure and attached to the wood shell.
